title: Concrete Items Curing│混凝土物品固化
description: Throw the Concrete Powder into the Water for become Concrete.│將混凝土粉末物品丟入水中將其轉換為混凝土。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Just drop the concrete powder item into water, water cauldron or Waterlogged block, it will auto harden(become Concrete).The concrete dust in the hands of the mob, soaked in water, will also harden.│只要將混凝土粉末物品丟進水、裝水的煉藥鍋或含水方塊中，它就會自動固化（變成混凝土）。浸泡在水中的生物手中的混凝土粉末也會自動固化。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
